IDEDIANotificationServices
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts
{
    public interface IDEDIANotificationServices
    {
        Task<Guid> Create(
            string filename,
            string fileType,
            MemoryStream outputStream);
    }
}
